Operation 'getLogicalTerminationPoint' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. The current summary and description are misleading - they claim to retrieve 'all' LogicalTerminationPoints, but the operation uses a specific {uniID} path parameter, indicating it retrieves a single resource. The description lacks clarity about what a LogicalTerminationPoint represents in this domain context, what the uniID parameter represents, and what the response contains. Added domain context from the schema definition and clarified the single-resource retrieval pattern for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_summary: Get all LogicalTerminationPoint managed by Domain Controller
data.current_description: Get all LogicalTerminationPoints managed by Domain Controller
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a specific LogicalTerminationPoint by UNI identifier
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a specific LogicalTerminationPoint resource identified by the provided UNI (User Network Interface) identifier. The LogicalTerminationPoint encapsulates the termination and adaptation functions of one or more transport layers at the specified UNI. Returns the complete LogicalTerminationPoint object including its layer protocol specifications and termination characteristics.
data.reasoning: The current summary and description are misleading - they claim to retrieve 'all' LogicalTerminationPoints, but the operation uses a specific {uniID} path parameter, indicating it retrieves a single resource. The description lacks clarity about what a LogicalTerminationPoint represents in this domain context, what the uniID parameter represents, and what the response contains. Added domain context from the schema definition and clarified the single-resource retrieval pattern for better AI agent understanding.

data.summary_suggestion: Delete a LogicalTerminationPoint by UNI identifier
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a LogicalTerminationPoint resource identified by the provided UNI (User Network Interface) identifier. This operation removes the termination and adaptation function definitions associated with the specified UNI. The deletion is permanent and will affect any ForwardingConstructs that reference this LogicalTerminationPoint. Returns a 204 No Content response on successful deletion.

data.current_description: Create, Create and Activate NRP Forwarding Construct. Use state variable for action.
data.summary_suggestion: Create and optionally activate a ForwardingConstruct
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new NRP ForwardingConstruct that models potential for forwarding between two or more Logical Termination Points at a specific layer protocol. The request body must include the ForwardingConstruct configuration. Use the state variable in the request to control whether the construct is created in an active or inactive state. Returns the created ForwardingConstruct with its assigned identifier and current state.
data.reasoning: Original summary is confusing with redundant 'Create/Create' phrasing and unclear about the dual action. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.
